'''gangushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:svce|svce]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ng-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:svce|svce]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gangushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gængishith|gængishith]] || [[word:gængishij|gængishij]] || [[word:gængishish|gængishish]] || [[word:gængishi|gængishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gangungushuth|gangungushuth]] || [[word:gangungushuj|gangungushuj]] || [[word:gangungushush|gangungushush]] || [[word:gangungushu|gangungushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gangushuth|gangushuth]] || [[word:gangushuj|gangushuj]] || [[word:gangushush|gangushush]] || [[word:gangushu|gangushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gangufshuth|gangufshuth]] || [[word:gangufshuj|gangufshuj]] || [[word:gangufshush|gangufshush]] || [[word:gangufshuf|gangufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gangushuthu|gangushuthu]] || [[word:gangushuju|gangushuju]] || [[word:gangushushu|gangushushu]] || [[word:gangushuku|gangushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gangushuth|gangushuth]] || [[word:gangushuj|gangushuj]] || [[word:gangushush|gangushush]] || [[word:gangushu|gangushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gangushuthul|gangushuthul]] || [[word:gangushujul|gangushujul]] || [[word:gangushushul|gangushushul]] || [[word:gangushukul|gangushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gangushuthuthu|gangushuthuthu]] || [[word:gangushujuju|gangushujuju]] || [[word:gangushushushu|gangushushushu]] || [[word:gangushuku|gangushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gangushuthun|gangushuthun]] || [[word:gangushujun|gangushujun]] || [[word:gangushushun|gangushushun]] || [[word:gangushukun|gangushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gangushuthuoro|gangushuthuoro]] || [[word:gangushujuoro|gangushujuoro]] || [[word:gangushushuoro|gangushushuoro]] || [[word:gangushukuoro|gangushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
